terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
## 1. Service Description

AI Workflow Lab ("the Platform") is an AI-native SaaS application platform providing workflow automation, app marketplace, and collaboration tools.

## 2. Account Registration

Users must provide accurate email addresses and company information when registering. Users are responsible for all activities under their account and may not share or transfer their account to others.

## 3. Free Trial

New organizations receive a 7-day free trial with access to all platform features and applications. The trial begins from the organization creation date. After the trial expires, a paid subscription is required to access paid applications.

## 4. Subscription & Payment

4.1 All payments are processed through Paddle, supporting WeChat Pay, Alipay, credit cards, and PayPal.

4.2 Subscription fees are charged according to the selected plan and billing cycle, priced in CNY.

4.3 Subscriptions auto-renew by default. Users can cancel auto-renewal at any time from the billing page.

## 5. Service Availability

We make commercially reasonable efforts to ensure service availability and stability, but do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service.

## 6. User Conduct

Users may not use the Platform for any illegal activities, upload malicious code, or infringe upon the intellectual property rights of others.

## 7. Intellectual Property

The Platform's code, design, trademarks, and other intellectual property belong to the Platform. Data generated by users during use belongs to the users.

## 8. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the Platform is not liable for indirect damages arising from the use of the service.

## 9. Changes to Terms

We may modify these terms from time to time. Material changes will be notified via email or platform notice. Continued use constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

## 10. Contact

For any questions, please contact us at support@aiworkflowlab.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
## 1. Information Collection

We collect the following types of information:

- **Account information**: Name, email address, company name, and industry information provided during registration
- **Usage data**: Platform feature usage, access logs, performance data
- **Payment information**: Payments are processed by Paddle; we do not store full payment card details

## 2. Use of Information

We use collected information to:

- Provide and maintain platform services
- Process payments and manage subscriptions
- Send important notifications (e.g., service updates, billing reminders)
- Improve product experience and features

## 3. Information Sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We only share information:

- With payment service providers (Paddle) as necessary
- To comply with legal requirements
- To protect our legitimate interests

## 4. Data Security

We employ industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit, access controls, and regular security audits.

## 5. Data Retention

We retain your data for the duration of your account. Upon account deletion, we will delete or anonymize your data within a reasonable timeframe.

## 6. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal information. You may exercise these rights through account settings or by contacting us.

## 7. Cookies

We use necessary cookies to maintain session state and preferences. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.

## 8. Third-Party Services

Our service may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party websites.

## 9. Policy Changes

We may update this privacy policy. Material changes will be notified via email or platform notice.

## 10. Contact

For privacy-related questions, please contact us at privacy@aiworkflowlab.com.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.content:
## 1. Refund Principles

We are committed to ensuring customer satisfaction. This refund policy explains our refund conditions and procedures.

## 2. Refund Eligibility

2.1 **First-time subscription**: Full refund available within 7 days of the first subscription.

2.2 **Auto-renewal**: Refund available within 3 days of the auto-renewal charge.

2.3 **Service outage**: If a major platform outage prevents normal use, partial refunds may be available based on impact.

## 3. Non-Refundable Situations

The following are not eligible for refunds:

- First subscription used for more than 7 days
- Auto-renewal past the 3-day window
- User-initiated requests based on change of mind or low usage
- Account termination due to Terms of Service violations

## 4. Refund Process

4.1 Send a refund request email to support@aiworkflowlab.com with your account email and reason for refund.

4.2 We will review your request within 3 business days.

4.3 Approved refunds will be returned via the original payment method. Arrival time depends on the payment channel (typically 5-15 business days).

## 5. Subscription Cancellation

You may cancel subscription auto-renewal at any time from the billing page. After cancellation, you can continue using the service until the end of the current billing period.

## 6. Downgrade Refunds

Downgrading from a higher plan to a lower plan does not generate a refund. Changes take effect at the end of the current billing period.

## 7. Contact

For refund-related questions, please contact us at support@aiworkflowlab.com.
